ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "formal_name" TEXT /* Formal name of the country */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of country (e.g., independent state, sovereign state) */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of country */,
  "sovereignty" TEXT /* Sovereignty of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "iso_4217_currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "iso_4217_currency_name" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency name */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total land area in square kilometers */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Main time zone(s) of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "iso_4217_currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "iso_4217_currency_name" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency name */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate */,
  "central_bank" TEXT /* Name of the central bank */,
  "symbol_position" TEXT /* Position of the currency symbol (e.g., before, after the amount) */,
  "decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places used for the currency */,
  "minor_unit" TEXT /* Name of the minor unit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_iso_4217_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("iso_4217_currency_code") REFERENCES countries ("iso_4217_currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "telephone_codes" (
  "telephone_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telephone code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the telephone code belongs to */,
  "itu_t_telephone_code" INTEGER /* ITU-T telephone code */,
  "country_calling_code" TEXT /* Country calling code (e.g., +93 for Afghanistan) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telephone_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telephone_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iso_3166_codes" (
  "iso_3166_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO 3166 code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the ISO 3166 code belongs to */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* ISO 3166-1 numeric code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_3166_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iso_3166_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iana_country_codes" (
  "iana_country_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IANA country code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the IANA country code belongs to */,
  "iana_country_code_tld" TEXT /* IANA country code TLD */,
  "tld" TEXT /* Top-Level Domain (e.g., .af for Afghanistan) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iana_country_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iana_country_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_capitals" (
  "country_capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country capital */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the capital city belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the capital city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_capitals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_types" (
  "country_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country type */,
  "country_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the country type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the exchange rate belongs to */,
  "exchange_rate_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "target_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target currency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate (e.g., central bank, market) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_target_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_sovereignty" (
  "country_sovereignty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country sovereignty */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the sovereignty belongs to */,
  "sovereignty" TEXT /* Sovereignty of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_sovereignty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_sovereignty_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_sub_types" (
  "country_sub_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country sub-type */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the sub-type belongs to */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_sub_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_sub_types_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report" TEXT /* Financial report details */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
